docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT BATUHAN GOKDENIZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOKDENIZ, BATUHAN $1,416.50 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,496.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
